svg.text: A CALIBRATION SCOPE short · field notes from 2026

g.text: so you read the fine print…
…back on the shelf, the X-3000 boots up:
It isn't unsure. It's certain — about the wrong thing.
the knobs that ship “certainty not included”
∴ “4” is the mode, not the law
↑ the gap is the entire product.
and it's the one with the
// certainty is a UI element, not a result
